name: Doug Phillips Park
description: Doug Phillips Park is a place to play pickleball in Fishkill, NY. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Dutchess Racquet Club
description: Dutchess Racquet Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Poughkeepsie, NY. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and lights.
hours: 7am - 9pm We Would Love to Have You Visit Soon! Hours 7 AM - 9 PM phone Chris Gilbert: (845)-464-7520 ​ Club: (845) 232-5077 Email [email protected] HOME ​SERVICES NEWSLETTER PROGRAMS MEMBERSHIP & RATES ​ CONTACT Home Membership & Rates Let's Play Services Programs Events News! Contact

description: They’re just past the tennis courts

name: Green street park
description: 2 courts, only 1 portable net.

name: Hagantown Park
description: Hagantown Park is a place to play pickleball in Poughkeepsie, NY. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Hudson Valley Pickleball and Golf
description: Come play pickleball at Hudson Valley Pickleball and Golf in Poughkeepsie, NY! There are 10 indoor hard and acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Open play at 8am, 1pm and 8pm most days.
fees: Fee required — $20 for non members, $10 for members

name: James Baird State Park
description: Come play pickleball at James Baird State Park in Pleasant Valley, NY! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Lakeside Park
description: Come play pickleball at Lakeside Park in Pawling, NY! There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

description: Come play pickleball at Lime Kiln Recreation Park in Hopewell Junction, NY! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Martz Field
description: Come play pickleball at Martz Field in Wappingers Falls, NY! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Poughkeepsie Tennis Club
description: Come play pickleball at Poughkeepsie Tennis Club in Poughkeepsie, NY! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water.

name: Pye lane
description: Pye lane is a place to play pickleball in Wappingers Falls, NY.

name: Quiet Cove
description: Come play pickleball at Quiet Cove in Poughkeepsie, NY! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Red hook Rec Park
description: Red hook Rec Park is a place to play pickleball in Red Hook, NY. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Rolin Pickleball
description: Rolin Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Red Hook, NY. There are 4 indoor acrylic and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and trainers or lessons. The courts are free.

name: South Avenue Park
description: South Avenue Park is a place to play pickleball in Beacon, NY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Spratt Park
description: Spratt Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Poughkeepsie, NY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Staatsburg
description: Come play pickleball at Staatsburg in Poughquag, NY! There is 1 outdoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to lights.

name: Staatsburg Fire House (rear ) aka Dinsmore Park
description: Staatsburg Fire House (rear ) aka Dinsmore Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Staatsburg, NY. There are 3 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Taconic Sport and Racquet
description: Taconic Sport and Racquet is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hopewell Junction, NY. There are 8 concrete courts. 4 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
